title: BookingRule
description: A set of rules governing how and when a demand-responsive transport service must be booked in advance.

latestBookingTime.description: Latest time before departure that a booking can be made

earliestBookingTime.description: Earliest time before departure that a booking can be made

priorNoticeDurationMin.description: Minimum advance notice in minutes required for booking

priorNoticeStartDay.description: Earliest day before service when booking opens

priorNoticeStartTime.description: Time of day on the start day when booking opens

phoneNumber.description: Phone number to call for booking

validity.description: Validity window for this policy version
